title: Connected inbox
description: A package-shaped example for connected data and follow-up work.

views.title: Inbox
views.description: A host-rendered view contributed by the package.

blocks.text: The package is the unit the agent creates and installs. Its Extension owns network behavior; Workspace validates and renders this adjacent surface manifest.

blocks.title: Connection boundary
blocks.text: The example tool can make bounded HTTPS JSON requests. Live binding of tool results into this canvas is the next host-bridge layer.
